title: selaginella steyermarkii
intro: Selaginella steyermarkii, also known as Steyermark's spikemoss, is a rare and endemic species of plant in the genus Selaginella, which is a type of ancient, non-vascular, and epiphytic plant often referred to as resurrection fern due to its ability to revive itself after drying. The medicinal properties of Selaginella steyermarkii lie in its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of conditions such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Selaginella steyermarkii is often used in the form of tea, tincture, or powder, and is typically consumed in moderation to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
